classes.description: A Safari document representing the active tab in a window.
classes.name: document

properties.description: The HTML source of the web page currently loaded in the document.
properties.name: source

properties.description: The current URL of the document.
properties.name: URL

properties.description: The text of the web page currently loaded in the document. Modifications to text aren't reflected on the web page.
properties.name: text

properties.description: The HTML source of the web page currently loaded in the tab.
properties.name: source

properties.description: The current URL of the tab.
properties.name: URL

properties.description: The index of the tab, ordered left to right.
properties.name: index

properties.description: The text of the web page currently loaded in the tab. Modifications to text aren't reflected on the web page.
properties.name: text

properties.description: Whether the tab is currently visible.
properties.name: visible

properties.description: The pid of the WebContent process backing the tab, if it exists.
properties.name: pid

commands.description: Add a new Reading List item with the given URL. Allows a custom title and preview text to be specified.

direct_parameter.description: URL of the Reading List item

commands.name: add reading list item

parameters.description: Preview text for the Reading List item, usually the first few sentences of the article
parameters.name: and preview text

parameters.description: Title of the Reading List item
parameters.name: with title

commands.description: Applies a string of JavaScript code to a document.
commands.name: do JavaScript

parameters.description: The tab that the JavaScript should be evaluated in.
parameters.name: in

commands.description: Emails the contents of a tab.
commands.name: email contents

commands.description: Searches the web using Safari's current search provider.
commands.name: search the web

parameters.description: The tab that the search results should shown in.
parameters.name: in

direct_parameter.description: The identifier of the extension to select.

commands.description: Dispatch a message to a Safari Extension.
commands.name: dispatch message to extension

commands.description: Make sure that all in-memory structures are in-sync with their on-disk counterparts.
commands.name: sync all plist to disk
